title: Thrash
shortSynopsis: When a catastrophic hurricane slams a coastal town, stranded residents must survive rapidly rising waters swarming with ravenous sharks.
When an unexpected road rage incident puts his son in critical condition, an enraged father spirals down a dark path of emotional turmoil and vengeance.

title: Roommates
shortSynopsis: When shy college freshman Devon asks cool-girl Celeste to be her roommate, a blossoming friendship quickly spirals into a war of passive aggression.

title: Sisu
shortSynopsis: In the waning days of WWII, a solitary gold prospector becomes a relentless, bloody one-man army battling a Nazi death squad retreating from Finland.

title: KPop Demon Hunters
shortSynopsis: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

title: Sniper 2
shortSynopsis: Sgt. Beckett teams with a death row inmate on a suicide mission to the Balkans, where they target a rogue general operating ethnic cleansing missions.

title: War Machine
shortSynopsis: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

title: Husband, Father, Killer: The Alyssa Pladl Story
shortSynopsis: When a couple reconnect with their biological daughter, her abusive father manipulates her into a dark and twisted relationship. Based on a true story.

title: Escape Plan 2: Hades
shortSynopsis: Security expert Ray Breslin's best operative is taken to a cutting-edge prison where he must fight for his life and search for a means of escape.

title: Anaconda
shortSynopsis: A group of friends decides to shoot a remake of their favorite movie in the Amazon rainforest — where a giant serpent with a monster appetite lurks.

title: Toaster
shortSynopsis: A miserly man tries to retrieve a toaster he gifted after a couple calls off their wedding, but is inadvertently drawn into murder.

title: Feel My Voice
shortSynopsis: As the only hearing member of a deaf family, a shy teen discovers her gift for singing, forcing her to choose between duty and finding her own path.

title: Ustaad Bhagat Singh
shortSynopsis: Raised by a kind, principled teacher, Bhagat Singh becomes a fearless cop who risks everything by standing up to a corrupt politician and his heir.

title: Youth
shortSynopsis: To his parents' dismay, teen Praveen devotes himself to finding romance over studying — but dating and heartbreak teach him what real love truly is.

title: Eat Pray Bark
shortSynopsis: Five dog owners seek help with their naughty pups from a legendary teacher in the mountains — but it's not their furry friends who need to be trained.

title: Tu Yaa Main
shortSynopsis: A rapper from Nalasopara and a South Bombay influencer see their relationship tested when a romantic getaway traps them with a killer crocodile.

title: Mudborn
shortSynopsis: While developing a horror game, Hsu-chuan mistakenly brings home a broken clay doll from work, unaware it houses a vengeful spirit hungering to be free.

title: Humint
shortSynopsis: A South Korean agent hunts a drug ring in Russia and goes head-to-head with a North Korean operative — pulling both into peril and tangled secrets.

title: 18th Rose
shortSynopsis: A spirited teen dreaming of the perfect debut makes a deal with a lonely newcomer, but unexpected feelings and revelations may shatter their plans.

title: Do Deewane Seher Mein
shortSynopsis: Set up for a potential arranged marriage, two young adults burdened by social pressures and self-doubt begin to find love and acceptance in each other.

title: Trust Me: The False Prophet: Season 1
shortSynopsis: In this true-crime documentary, a cult expert and filmmaker infiltrate a polygamist sect to expose a self-proclaimed prophet and bring him to justice.

title: Salish & Jordan Matter: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Follow daughter-and-dad duo Salish and Jordan through a series of wild setups and extreme challenges in this remix of classic Matter family moments.

title: Big Mistakes: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Blackmailed into working for some very dangerous people, two deeply incapable siblings become the most disorganized duo in organized crime.

title: XO, Kitty: Season 3
shortSynopsis: With her love life heating up, Kitty’s all set to kick off an iconic senior year. But will secrets, scandals and her own insecurities get in her way?

title: Raw: 2026 - April 13, 2026
shortSynopsis: Days before CM Punk defends the World Heavyweight Title against Roman Reigns, the final Raw before WrestleMania 42 emanates from Sacramento, Calif.

title: At Home With The Furys: Season 2
shortSynopsis: Tyson and Paris are back for another round of family life in Morecambe, as they juggle raising teens with a knockout offer of a return to the ring.

title: The Cleaning Lady: Season 1
shortSynopsis: A brilliant surgeon moves to the US to save her son's life, but after witnessing a murder, she's forced to work for the mob in this crime drama series.

title: Temptation Island: Season 2
shortSynopsis: Four couples at a crossroads test their bond by splitting up and sharing a villa with alluring singles looking for love in this steamy reality series.

title: Danny Go!: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Who's ready to dance, sing and play? Join Danny Go and pals for off-the-couch adventures, brain breaks and interactive learning games kids will love.

title: BEEF: Season 2
shortSynopsis: At an elite country club, two young employees film an alarming fight between their boss and his wife — and ignite a blackmail war neither side can win.

title: Bandi: Season 1
shortSynopsis: After their mother's death, a group of orphaned siblings in Martinique struggles to get by, driving some of them toward crime as a way to stay together.

title: Ronaldinho: The One and Only: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: This series follows the life and career of Brazilian soccer star Ronaldinho, tracing his journey from young prodigy to global sports icon.

title: Bloodhounds: Season 2
shortSynopsis: Two young boxers gear up for another fight when a global syndicate running an illegal boxing league targets them and puts their loved ones at risk.

title: Fake Profile: Season 3
shortSynopsis: Camila and Miguel's honeymoon turns into a nightmare when they befriend a seductive couple. As Ángela Ferrer proves her innocence, Red Velvet kills again.

title: Someone Has to Know: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: When a teen goes missing, a detective and his team launch a tireless investigation to solve the mystery in this drama series inspired by true events.

title: Made with Love: Season 1
shortSynopsis: To save her mother's restaurant, ambitious chef Luka has no choice but to work alongside talented newcomer Dennis. The only catch? She hates him.

title: Bloodhounds: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Three friends working for a benevolent moneylender band together to take down a ruthless loan shark who preys on the financially desperate.

title: The Law According to Lidia Poët: Season 3
shortSynopsis: An old friend's unexpected return embroils Lidia in a high-profile court case that upends her discreet love life and threatens the fight for equality.

title: Alpha Males: Season 5
shortSynopsis: Solo living comes with chaos — and now the women in their lives are pursuing their own reinventions. Could man-only housing solve the friends' issues?

title: Detective Hole: Season 1
shortSynopsis: When a series of ritualistic murders hits Oslo, a gifted detective must navigate a puzzle of patterns, corruption and his own demons to catch the killer.
